table.name: vtiger_productmodel
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_productmodel` ( `productmodelid` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `model_number` VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`productmodelid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_productmodelcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_productmodelcf` ( `productmodelid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`productmodelid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
